rationale: Both correctly identify #4527 as the regression and #4792 (folded into the 0.24 rebase commit a560ed18) as the fix, matching the thread's resolution. Y grounds the mechanism more deeply, tracing the full causal chain through the scheduling coordinator's _FULL_PAYLOAD_INPUT_STAGES/WAITING_FOR_INPUT logic and the exact timeout log line the reporter hit, plus explains why async_chunk:true was unaffected and flags unrelated red herrings (NVFP4 patch, #4962) in the reporter's env. X's diagnosis is essentially the same but cites fewer locations and ends with an unrelated, confusing 'skill candidates' blurb about HunyuanImage3 that has nothing to do with this issue, hurting polish and completeness.
